title: MapReduce Security Token Management
description: The 'security/token' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses the 'DelegationTokenIdentifier' class. This class is responsible for managing MapReduce-specific delegation tokens, ensuring secure job submission and tracking. It extends 'AbstractDelegationTokenIdentifier' to provide functionality, defining 'MAPREDUCE_DELEGATION_KIND' for token identification. The class constructs identifiers with owner, renewer, and real user details, focusing on secure operations rather than traditional input/output handling. It depends on Hadoop's classification, IO, and security token delegation packages.

raw_response:
TITLE: MapReduce Security Token Management

DESCRIPTION:
The 'security/token' directory in Hadoop MapReduce houses the 'DelegationTokenIdentifier' class. This class is responsible for managing MapReduce-specific delegation tokens, ensuring secure job submission and tracking. It extends 'AbstractDelegationTokenIdentifier' to provide functionality, defining 'MAPREDUCE_DELEGATION_KIND' for token identification. The class constructs identifiers with owner, renewer, and real user details, focusing on secure operations rather than traditional input/output handling. It depends on Hadoop's classification, IO, and security token delegation packages.
